title: Webhook secret only optional in env schema
issue: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is .optional() so the app boots without it and skips signature verification.
consequence: Forged webhook calls could grant subscriptions.

verification.note: This needs direct code verification. Keeping as high pending verification.

fix: Make the secret required; fail boot if missing.

title: Debug route ships to production
issue: A /api/dev/dump route returns internal state and is not gated by NODE_ENV.
fix: Gate behind an env check or exclude from the production build.
